channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dirt piled in the turn around, 12th April
item.description:
Thames water are using the whole of the turnaround to store the dirt they digging out, I know works have to be done, but because they using the whole turnaround we have had two accidents in road this weekend. It’s quite a big turnaround do they really need to use the whole turnaround. We have a wall in front of us that makes it hard to turn around, for delivery drivers, ambulances and fire engines. So put our properties at risk we are in Basing Drive. Even Thames water cannot turn around and are backup the road at speed, putting lives at risk
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Basing Drive, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Graffiti Thankyou

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 221, Havil Street, Camberwell, Greater London

item.description:
Bag of rubbish dumped by steps to substation. Tbere is constant dumping at this location.

item.title: Damage to parking notice pole outside 34 Plaistow Lane, BR1 3PA, 12th April
item.description:
The parking post has been hit by a vehicle. Could this please be repaired asap. It has been at an angle for some weeks. Thank you. Cllr Alisa Igoe

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 46, Plaistow Lane, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bikes left all over the pavement, 12th April
item.description:
Pavement blocked by lime bikes

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24-30, West Smithfield, City of London

item.title: Tree in danger of blowing over., 12th April
item.description:
The tree is gradually being bent by the wind and needs support.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mentmore Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking pavement, 12th April
item.description:
Car is parked blocking the pedestrian route forcing pedestrians into the cycle lane

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albatross Way, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned homeless person’s stuff, 12th April
item.description:
In the green garden area between the carpark and the alleyway that runs from Rochester Ave and Kentish way, there is lots of abandoned stuff that looks like it was used by homeless people, it’s been like it for weeks so it doesn’t look like it’s being used any more.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stockwell Close, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 12th April
item.description:
Beckenham Place Parkiutsidd park Remove graffiti fro. Bus shelter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckenham Hill Road, Southend, Greater London

item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Bins left on the street, 12th April
item.description:
Bins left on the street since Saturday no dustman came this weekend, dangerous leaving in the middle of the path way

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Robert Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On Dunmore Road northside by lamppost 4, 12th April
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Carlisle Road, Kilburn, London

item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Fly-tipping Marlow House ( St Saviours Estate), 12th April
item.description:
There is fly-tipped furniture located outside the bin area at Marlow House on St Saviour’s Estate. The dumped items are making the estate look untidy. Please remove asap.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 60, Maltby Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The tree in front of my house was struck by lightning over two years ago. This tree is dead. Come and cut it down before it falls ontot he road or onto the property., 12th April
item.description:
This tree has been dead for over two years ago when it was struck by lightenning. Come and cut it down. Also because it's roots are growing outwards by Housing association is unable to fix my fence. The tree is protected. But it is dead!
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwood Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken gate since 2020, 12th April
item.description:
Can this gate be fixed as this has been broken since 2020 and neglected by the council Also the fence on the right side looks like it's fallen due to winds since the past years DON'T IGNORE PLEASE

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Goldfinch Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped by someone at 3am - 6am 11.04.26, 12th April
item.description:
Can we please introduce signs saying fly tipping is a crime as people are coming here casually to dump their crap Also please if Peabody can clean this up asap as it's such an eye sore

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Goldfinch Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped sun lounger on melbourne grove at junction with Lytcott grove SE22, 12th April
item.description:
Fly tipped sun lounger outside small urban orchard on junction of Melbourne grove and Lytcott grove SE22

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 109, Melbourne Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clovelly Way, Crofton, Greater London
